title: Clayton
content:
Roof Restoration Clayton

Is your roof starting to look dull, worn out, or showing early signs of damage? At Sandhurst Roofing, we provide reliable and affordable roof restoration in Clayton that gives your roof a new lease on life. From cleaning and repairs to sealing and painting, our experienced team takes care of everything to restore your roof’s strength, colour, and protection.

Get a Free Quote!

Expert Roofers Who Understand Clayton Homes

Roofs in Clayton face a mix of challenges — from heat exposure and stormy weather to moss build-up on older tiles. Our team has worked on hundreds of homes across the south-east suburbs, so we know exactly what it takes to keep local roofs performing well year after year. Whether you own a brick home with terracotta tiles or a modern townhouse with a Colorbond® roof, we tailor our roof restoration services to match your property’s specific needs.

What’s Included in Our Roof Restoration Service

Our complete restoration process ensures your roof not only looks fantastic but also performs better than before:

  • Detailed inspection – identifying damage, cracked tiles, leaks or rust.
  • High-pressure cleaning – removing grime, moss, and years of build-up.
  • Roof repairs – re-bedding, re-pointing, replacing broken tiles, and fixing flashings.
  • Protective coatings – applying a durable sealant and topcoat that enhances weather resistance and colour retention.
  • Gutter & drainage check – making sure water flows properly to prevent future damage.

The result is a roof that looks like new, performs efficiently, and adds value to your home.

Get a Free Quote!

Why Homeowners in Clayton Trust Sandhurst Roofing

  • Over 30 years of hands-on roofing experience.
  • Fully licensed and insured professionals.
  • Premium Australian materials designed for local conditions.
  • Honest advice — if you don’t need a complete restoration, we’ll tell you.
  • Long-lasting warranties for your peace of mind.

We take pride in our workmanship and treat every home as if it were our own.

More Than Just Roof Restoration

Beyond roof restoration in Clayton, we also provide:
  • Roof repairs and maintenance
  • Gutter replacements and cleaning
  • Roof painting and re-coating
  • Colorbond® roof restoration
So whether you’re dealing with leaks, fading paint, or damaged gutters, our team has you covered.

What Our Customers Say

Steve was very punctual with coming to assess our roofing situation. He discussed with me every aspect of the job required for the replacement of our very old tin roof.This all happened at a particularly busy time for Steve’s company and he kept me up to date with the preparation of the job. Once it started it was a very slick operation completed within 4 days. I wasn’t there during the day but saw the results of progress each afternoon. They have done a very neat professional job and I am very happy with the result. Steve was a pleasure to deal with. Well done.

Cameron Kennedy-Miller
★★★★★

Quick response to request for estimate. Price matched that given by local plumber. Work commenced soon after acceptance of quote and as agreed. Standard of work very good – impressive. Corrugated iron roof replaced with ColourBond – 2 day’s work. (New insulation laid over old, no battens replaced, screwed down). Roof no longer leaking and good work around chimney flue. Adaptable to site requirements. Due regard to safety of residents and pets. Excellent site clean-up (choice of remove old iron or keep it). Would use this organisation again.

Collin Parker
★★★★★ View All Reviews

Get a Free Roof Restoration Quote in Clayton

If your roof is ready for a transformation, talk to the experts at Sandhurst Roofing today. Call Steve on 0448 812 800 or use our online form for a free, no-obligation quote.

Let us help you protect your home and restore your roof’s beauty and durability with our trusted roof restoration Clayton services.

Get a Quote!
